
  // Type_func
  public class Type_func {
    var type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    var type_type : Type_type
    var anylist : Type_anylist
    var context : Type_context
    var scope : Type_scope
  }
  // Generic_func_any
  public class Generic_func_any : Vx_Core.Generic_any {
    // p_type_type
    override public func p_type_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
      return t_func
    }
  }
  // Type_scope
  public class Type_scope {
    var p_anymap : Type_anymap = e_anymap
  }
  // Type_var
  public class Type_var {
    var p_name : Type_string = e_string
    var p_value : Type_any = e_any
    var p_func : Type_func = e_func
    var p_type : Type_type = e_type
    var p_resolved : Type_boolean = c_false
  }
  // v_any_from_var_scope
  public static func v_any_from_var_scope(
    _ type_var : Type_var,
    _ type_scope : Type_scope
  ) -> Type_any {
    var output : Type_any = p_value
    if type_var.p_resolved === c_true {
    } else if type_var.p_func !== e_func {
      p_value = v_call_scope(
        type_var.p_func,
        type_scope
      )
    }
  }
  // v_call
  public static func v_call(
    _ type_func : Type_func
  ) -> Type_any {
    let type_type : Type_type = type_func.type_type
    let context : Type_context = type_func.context
    let scope : Type_anylist = type_func.scope
    let anylist : Type_anylist = type_func.anylist
    let generic_any : Generic_any = v_generic_any_from_any(type_type.type_any)
    let output : Type_any = generic_any.v_call(context, scope, anylist)
    return output
  }
  // v_anylist_from_anylist_scope
  public static func v_anylist_from_anylist_scope(
    _ type_anylist : Type_anylist,
    _ type_scope : Type_scope
  ) -> Type_anylist {
    var output : Type_anylist = type_anylist
    var ischanged : Bool = false
    let listany : [Type_any] = type_anylist.listany
    var listout : [Type_any] = []
    for type_any : Type_any in listany {
      let typenamen : String = v_typenamen_from_any(type_any)
      switch typenamen {
      case "vx/core/var":
        let type_var : Type_var = v_var_from_any(type_any)
        let out_any : Type_any = v_any_from_var_scope(type_var, type_scope)
        listout.append(out_any)
      default:
        listout.append(type_any)
      }
    }
    if ischanged {
      output = v_anylist_from_listany(listout)
    }
    return output
  }
  // Generic_func_type
  public class Generic_func_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type {
    // p_any_from_any
    override public func p_any_from_any(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Type_func = v_func_any_from_any(type_type, type_any)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_copy
    override public func p_copy(
      _ copyany : Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let copyval : Type_func = v_func_from_any(copyany)
      let value : Type_func = v_func_copy(copyval, type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_new
    override public func p_new(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Type_func = f_func(type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
  }
  // v_func_constructor
  public static func v_func_constructor(
  ) -> Type_func {
    Vx_Core.v_global_reserve()
    return Type_func()
  }
  // v_func_create
  public static func v_func_create(
  ) -> Type_func {
    var output : Type_func = v_func_constructor()
    v_func_startup(output)
    return output
  }
  // v_func_register
  public static func v_func_register(
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    v_func_startup_type()
    v_func_startup_empty()
    return t_func
  }
  // v_func_shutdown - mutating
  public static func v_func_shutdown(
    _ value : Type_func
  ) {
    let type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    if let generic_any : Generic_func_any = type_any.generic_any {
      generic_any.backref = nil
    }
    value.type_func = Vx_Core.e_func
  }
  // v_func_startup - mutating
  public static func v_func_startup(
    _ value : Type_func
  ) {
    let generic_any : Generic_func_any = Generic_func_any()
    generic_any.backref = value
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_new_from_type_generic_any(
      t_func,
      generic_any
    )
  }
  // v_func_startup_empty
  public static func v_func_startup_empty() {
    v_func_startup(e_func)
    Vx_Core.v_startup_e(
      t_func,
      e_func.type_any
    )
  }
  // v_func_startup_type
  public static func v_func_startup_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    let type_type = t_func
    type_type.p_name = Vx_Core.v_string_from_stringn("vx/core/func")
    type_type.p_extends = Vx_Core.c_extends_func
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = Generic_func_type()
    Vx_Core.v_startup_t(
      type_type,
      generic_type
    )
    return type_type
  }
  // v_any_from_func
  public static func v_any_from_func(
    _ value : Vx_Core.Type_func
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    return output
  }
  // v_func_from_any
  public static func v_func_from_any(
    _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_func {
    let generic_any : Vx_Core.Generic_any = Vx_Core.v_generic_any_from_any(type_any)
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_func = generic_any.p_type_func()
    return output
  }
  // v_func_new_from_any_generic_func
  public static func v_func_new_from_any_generic_func(
    _ type_any : Type_any,
    _ generic_func : Generic_func
  ) -> Type_func {
    let output : Type_func = Type_func()
    output.type_any = type_any
    output.generic_func = generic_func
    generic_func.type_any = type_any
    return output
  }
  // v_func_copy
  public static func v_func_copy(
    _ copyval : Vx_Core.Type_func,
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_func {
    return copyval
  }
  // f_func
  public static func f_func(
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_func {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_func = v_func_copy(e_func, anylist)
    return output
  }
  public static let t_func : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.v_type_constructor()
  public static let e_func : Type_func = v_func_constructor()
